#include "src/fastertransformer/th_op/bert/BertOp.h"

namespace th = torch;
namespace torch_ext {

FasterTransformerBert::FasterTransformerBert(th::Tensor q_kernel,
                                             th::Tensor q_bias,
                                             th::Tensor k_kernel,
                                             th::Tensor k_bias,
                                             th::Tensor v_kernel,
                                             th::Tensor v_bias,
                                             th::Tensor attr_output_kernel,
                                             th::Tensor attr_output_bias,
                                             th::Tensor attr_output_layernorm_gamma,
                                             th::Tensor attr_output_layernorm_beta,
                                             th::Tensor inter_kernel,
                                             th::Tensor inter_bias,
                                             th::Tensor output_kernel,
                                             th::Tensor output_bias,
                                             th::Tensor output_layernorm_gamma,
                                             th::Tensor output_layernorm_beta,
                                             int64_t    head_num,
                                             int64_t    head_size,
                                             int64_t    inter_size,
                                             bool       remove_padding,
                                             int64_t    layer_num,
                                             bool       sparse,
                                             double     q_scaling,
                                             int64_t    tensor_para_size,
                                             int64_t    pipeline_para_size):
    _st(q_kernel.scalar_type()),
    _remove_padding(remove_padding),
    weights{q_kernel,
            q_bias,
            k_kernel,
            k_bias,
            v_kernel,
            v_bias,
            attr_output_kernel,
            attr_output_bias,
            attr_output_layernorm_gamma,
            attr_output_layernorm_beta,
            inter_kernel,
            inter_bias,
            output_kernel,
            output_bias,
            output_layernorm_gamma,
            output_layernorm_beta}
{
    CHECK_INPUT(q_kernel, _st);                     // hidden_dim, hidden_dim
    CHECK_INPUT(q_bias, _st);                       // hidden_dim
    CHECK_INPUT(k_kernel, _st);                     // hidden_dim, hidden_dim
    CHECK_INPUT(k_bias, _st);                       // hidden_dim
    CHECK_INPUT(v_kernel, _st);                     // hidden_dim, hidden_dim
    CHECK_INPUT(v_bias, _st);                       // hidden_dim
    CHECK_INPUT(attr_output_kernel, _st);           // hidden_dim, hidden_dim
    CHECK_INPUT(attr_output_bias, _st);             // hidden_dim
    CHECK_INPUT(attr_output_layernorm_gamma, _st);  // hidden_dim
    CHECK_INPUT(attr_output_layernorm_beta, _st);   // hidden_dim
    CHECK_INPUT(inter_kernel, _st);                 // 4 * hidden_dim, hidden_dim
    CHECK_INPUT(inter_bias, _st);                   // 4 * hidden_dim
    CHECK_INPUT(output_kernel, _st);                // hidden_dim, 4 * hidden_dim
    CHECK_INPUT(output_bias, _st);                  // hidden_dim
    CHECK_INPUT(output_layernorm_gamma, _st);       // hidden_dim
    CHECK_INPUT(output_layernorm_beta, _st);        // hidden_dim

    switch (_st) {
        case at::ScalarType::Float:
            ftbert = new FTBert<float>(head_num,
                                       head_size,
                                       inter_size,
                                       layer_num,
                                       sparse,
                                       q_scaling,
                                       tensor_para_size,
                                       pipeline_para_size,
                                       weights);
            break;
        case at::ScalarType::Half:
            ftbert = new FTBert<half>(head_num,
                                      head_size,
                                      inter_size,
                                      layer_num,
                                      sparse,
                                      q_scaling,
                                      tensor_para_size,
                                      pipeline_para_size,
                                      weights);
            break;
#ifdef ENABLE_BF16
        case at::ScalarType::BFloat16:
            ftbert = new FTBert<__nv_bfloat16>(head_num,
                                               head_size,
                                               inter_size,
                                               layer_num,
                                               sparse,
                                               q_scaling,
                                               tensor_para_size,
                                               pipeline_para_size,
                                               weights);
            break;
#endif
        default:
            throw std::runtime_error("Wrong Tensor type.");
    }
    head_info       = torch::empty({8}, torch::dtype(torch::kInt64));
    head_info[0]    = head_num;
    head_info[1]    = head_size;
    head_info[2]    = (int64_t)remove_padding;
    head_info[3]    = layer_num;
    head_info[4]    = (int64_t)sparse;
    head_info[5]    = inter_size;
    head_info[6]    = tensor_para_size;
    head_info[7]    = pipeline_para_size;
    scaling_info    = torch::empty({1}, torch::dtype(torch::kFloat64));
    scaling_info[0] = (double)q_scaling;
}

FasterTransformerBert::~FasterTransformerBert()
{
    delete ftbert;
}

th::Tensor FasterTransformerBert::forward(th::Tensor input, th::Tensor sequence_lengths)
{
    CHECK_INPUT(input, _st);
    CHECK_TH_CUDA(sequence_lengths);
    CHECK_CONTIGUOUS(sequence_lengths);
    TORCH_CHECK(sequence_lengths.dtype() == torch::kInt32, "sequence_lengths dtype should be int32");
    size_t batch_size = (size_t)input.size(0);
    size_t seq_len    = (size_t)input.size(1);

    auto output = torch::empty_like(input);
    ftbert->forward(batch_size, seq_len, input, sequence_lengths, output, _remove_padding);
    return output;
}

std::vector<th::Tensor> FasterTransformerBert::get_pickle_info() const
{
    std::vector<th::Tensor> tmp(weights);
    tmp.push_back(head_info);
    tmp.push_back(scaling_info);

}

285	
286	    infer_decode_args = dict(

289	        top_p=top_p * torch.ones(batch_size, dtype=torch.float32),

293	        beam_search_diversity_rate=beam_search_diversity_rate * torch.ones(batch_size, dtype=torch.float32),
294	        len_penalty=len_penalty * torch.ones(size=[batch_size], dtype=torch.float32),
295	        bad_words_list=bad_words_list,
296	        min_length=min_length * torch.ones(size=[batch_size], dtype=torch.int32),
297	        random_seed=random_seed_tensor
298	    )
299	
300	    if not args.use_gpt_decoder_ops:
301	        def gpt_generate_fn():
302	            tokens_batch = gpt(start_ids,
303	                               start_lengths,
304	                               output_len,
305	                               return_output_length=return_output_length,
306	                               return_cum_log_probs=return_cum_log_probs,
307	                               **infer_decode_args)
308	            return tokens_batch
309	    else:
310	        def gpt_generate_fn():
311	            output_dict = gpt.generate(input_token_ids=start_ids,
312	                                       input_lengths=start_lengths,
313	                                       gen_length=output_len,
314	                                       eos_token_id=end_id,
315	                                       return_output_length=return_output_length,
316	                                       return_log_probs=return_cum_log_probs,
317	                                       **infer_decode_args)
318	            return output_dict
319	
320	    # Generate tokens.
321	    gen_outputs = gpt_generate_fn()
322	
323	    if rank == 0:
324	        if not args.use_gpt_decoder_ops:
325	            if return_cum_log_probs > 0:
326	                tokens_batch, _, cum_log_probs = gen_outputs
327	            else:
328	                tokens_batch, cum_log_probs = gen_outputs, None
329	        else:
330	            tokens_batch = gen_outputs['output_token_ids']
331	            cum_log_probs = gen_outputs['cum_log_probs'] if return_cum_log_probs > 0 else None
332	        if cum_log_probs is not None:
333	            print('[INFO] Log probs of sentences:', cum_log_probs)
334	
335	        outputs = []
336	        tokens_batch = tokens_batch.cpu().numpy()
337	        for i, (context, tokens) in enumerate(zip(contexts, tokens_batch)):
338	            for beam_id in range(beam_width):
339	                token = tokens[beam_id][start_lengths[i]:]  # exclude context input from the output
340	                if args.skip_end_tokens:
341	                    token = token[token != end_id]
342	                output = enc.decode(token) if args.detokenize else ' '.join(str(t) for t in token.tolist())
343	                outputs.append(output)
344	                print(f'[INFO] batch {i}, beam {beam_id}:\n[Context]\n{context}\n\n[Output]\n{output}\n')
345	
346	        if args.sample_output_file:
347	            with open(args.sample_output_file, "w+") as f:
348	                outputs = [o.replace("\n", "\\n") for o in outputs]
349	                f.writelines("\n".join(outputs))
350	
351	    # Measure inference time.
352	    if args.time:
353	        iterations = 10
354	        for _ in range(iterations):
355	            gpt_generate_fn()
356	        time = timeit.default_timer()
357	        for _ in range(iterations):
358	            gpt_generate_fn()
359	        time_elapsed = timeit.default_timer() - time
360	        print(f'[INFO] GPT time costs: {time_elapsed * 1000 / iterations:.2f} ms')
361	
362	
363	if __name__ == '__main__':
364	    main()

# Copyright (c) 2021-2023, NVIDIA CORPORATION.  All rights reserved.

# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

import argparse
import configparser
import os
import sys
import timeit

import torch
from torch.nn.utils.rnn import pad_sequence

dir_path = os.path.dirname(os.path.realpath(__file__))
sys.path.append(os.path.join(dir_path, "../../.."))
import examples.pytorch.gpt.utils.gpt_token_encoder as encoder
from examples.pytorch.gpt.utils import comm
from examples.pytorch.gpt.utils import gpt_decoder
from examples.pytorch.gpt.utils.parallel_gpt import ParallelGPT

from utils import word_list

@torch.no_grad()
def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument('--layer_num', type=int, default=24,
                        help='number of layers')
    parser.add_argument('--input_len', type=int, default=1,
                        help='input sequence length to generate.')
    parser.add_argument('--output_len', type=int, default=32,
                        help='output sequence length to generate.')
    parser.add_argument('--head_num', type=int, default=16,
                        help='head number')
    parser.add_argument('--size_per_head', type=int, default=64,
                        help='size per head')
    parser.add_argument('--vocab_size', type=int, default=50304,
                        help='vocab size')
    parser.add_argument('--beam_width', type=int, default=1,
                        help='beam width for beam search. Using sampling when beam width is 1.')
    parser.add_argument('--top_k', type=int, default=1,
                        help='top k candidate num')
    parser.add_argument('--top_p', type=float, default=0.,
                        help='top p probability threshold')
    parser.add_argument('--temperature', type=float, default=1.,
                        help='temperature')
    parser.add_argument('--len_penalty', type=float, default=0.,
                        help='len_penalty')
    parser.add_argument('--beam_search_diversity_rate', type=float, default=0.,
                        help='beam_search_diversity_rate')
    parser.add_argument('--tensor_para_size', type=int, default=1,
                        help='tensor parallel size')
    parser.add_argument('--pipeline_para_size', type=int, default=1,
                        help='pipeline parallel size')
    parser.add_argument('--ckpt_path', type=str, default='../models/megatron-models/c-model/345m/1-gpu',
                        help='path to the checkpoint file.')
    parser.add_argument('--lib_path', type=str, default='./lib/libth_transformer.so',
                        help='path to the pyt_fastertransformer dynamic lib file.')
    parser.add_argument('--vocab_file', type=str, default="../models/gpt2-vocab.json",
                        help='vocabulary file.')
    parser.add_argument('--merges_file', type=str, default="../models/gpt2-merges.txt",
                        help='merges file.')
    parser.add_argument('--start_id', type=int, default=50256,
                        help='start token id.')
    parser.add_argument('--end_id', type=int, default=50256,
                        help='end token id.')
    parser.add_argument('--max_batch_size', type=int, default=8,
                        help='max batch size.')
    parser.add_argument('--repetition_penalty', type=float, default=1.,
                        help='repetition penalty')
    parser.add_argument('--presence_penalty', type=float, default=0.,
                        help='presence penalty. Similar to repetition, but addive rather than multiplicative.')
    parser.add_argument('--min_length', type=int, default=0,
                        help='A minimum number of tokens to generate')
    parser.add_argument('--max_seq_len', type=int, default=1024,
                        help='max sequence length for position embedding table.')
    parser.add_argument('--inference_data_type', '--data_type', type=str, choices=['fp32', 'fp16', 'bf16'], default='fp32')
    parser.add_argument('--time', action='store_true',
                        help='whether or not to measure time elapsed.')
    parser.add_argument('--sample_input_file', type=str, default=None,
                        help='path to sample input file. If not set, it runs with no context inputs.')
    parser.add_argument('--sample_output_file', type=str, default=None,
                        help='path to sample output file.')
    parser.add_argument('--enable_random_seed', action='store_true',
                        help='is use the random seed for sentences in a batch.')
    parser.add_argument('--skip_end_tokens', dest='skip_end_tokens', action='store_true',
                        help='Whether to remove or not end tokens in outputs.')
    parser.add_argument('--no_detokenize', dest='detokenize', action='store_false',
                        help='Skip detokenizing output token ids.')
    parser.add_argument('--use_jieba_tokenizer', action='store_true',
                        help='use JiebaBPETokenizer as tokenizer.')
    parser.add_argument('--int8_mode', type=int, default=0, choices=[0, 1],
                        help='The level of quantization to perform.'
                             ' 0: No quantization. All computation in data_type'
                             ' 1: Quantize weights to int8, all compute occurs in fp16/bf16. Not supported when data_type is fp32')
    parser.add_argument(
        '--weights_data_type',
        type=str,
        default="fp32",
        choices=["fp32", "fp16"],
        help='Data type of FT checkpoint weights',
    )
    parser.add_argument('--return_cum_log_probs', type=int, default=0, choices=[0, 1, 2],
                        help='Whether to compute the cumulative log probsbility of sentences.'
                             ' 0: do not return the cumulative log probs '
                             ' 1: return the cumulative log probs of generated sequences'
                             ' 2: return the cumulative log probs of sequences')
    parser.add_argument('--shared_contexts_ratio', type=float, default=1.0,
                        help='Triggers the shared context optimization when'
                             'compact_size <= shared_contexts_ratio * batch_size'
                             'A value of 0.0 deactivate the optimization')
    parser.add_argument('--banned_words',
        type=str,
        default="",
        help='A comma separated list of tokens that should never be generated. Everything between the commas will'
             ' be tokenized and converted to token ids that will be banned.'
             ' Note that spaces before and after commas are included in tokenization.'
             ' An example highlighting this importance is that "the" and " the" are'
             ' two separate tokens some vocabularies.'
             ' Therefore, do ban a certain phrase, we would need to specify all tokens'
             ' in the vocabulary that include the phrase.'
             ' Example use: --banned_words "the, the,a,boy". This will ban the tokens "the", " the", "a" and "boy".'
             ' We can also use a pipe "|" to ban different tokens for different sentences in a batch.'
             ' Example: --banned_words "the, the|a,boy" will ban the tokens "the" and " the" in output sentence 1 and'
             ' ban the tokens "a" and "boy" in output sentence 2. When using this mode, we must specify a set of tokens to ban'
             ' for each sentence in the batch.',
    )
    parser.add_argument('--use_gpt_decoder_ops', action='store_true',
                        help='Use separate decoder FT operators instead of end-to-end model op.')
    args = parser.parse_args()

    ckpt_config = configparser.ConfigParser()
    ckpt_config_path = os.path.join(args.ckpt_path, 'config.ini')
    if os.path.isfile(ckpt_config_path):
        ckpt_config.read(ckpt_config_path)
    if 'gpt' in ckpt_config.keys():
        for args_key, config_key, func in [
            ('layer_num', 'num_layer', ckpt_config.getint),
            ('max_seq_len', 'max_pos_seq_len', ckpt_config.getint),
            ('weights_data_type', 'weight_data_type', ckpt_config.get),
        ]:
            if config_key in ckpt_config['gpt'].keys():
                prev_val = args.__dict__[args_key]
                args.__dict__[args_key] = func('gpt', config_key)
                print('Loading {} from config.ini,    previous: {},    current: {}'.format(
                    args_key, prev_val, args.__dict__[args_key]))
            else:
                print('Not loading {} from config.ini'.format(args_key))
        for key in ['head_num', 'size_per_head', 'tensor_para_size']:
            if key in args.__dict__:
                prev_val = args.__dict__[key]
                args.__dict__[key] = ckpt_config.getint('gpt', key)
                print('Loading {} from config.ini,    previous: {},    current: {}'.format(
                    key, prev_val, args.__dict__[key]))
            else:
                print('Not loading {} from config.ini'.format(key))
    if 'structure' in ckpt_config.keys():
        gpt_with_moe = ckpt_config.getboolean('structure', 'gpt_with_moe')
        expert_num = ckpt_config.getint('structure', 'expert_num')
        moe_layer_index_str = ckpt_config.get('structure', 'moe_layers')
        if len(moe_layer_index_str) <= 2:
            moe_layer_index = []
        else:
            moe_layer_index = [int(n) for n in moe_layer_index_str[1:-1].replace(' ', '').split(',')]
        moe_k = 1
    else:
        gpt_with_moe = False
        expert_num = 0
        moe_layer_index = []
        moe_k = 0

    layer_num = args.layer_num
    output_len = args.output_len
    head_num = args.head_num
    size_per_head = args.size_per_head
    vocab_size = args.vocab_size
    beam_width = args.beam_width
    top_k = args.top_k
    top_p = args.top_p
    temperature = args.temperature
    len_penalty = args.len_penalty
    beam_search_diversity_rate = args.beam_search_diversity_rate
    tensor_para_size = args.tensor_para_size
    pipeline_para_size = args.pipeline_para_size
    start_id = args.start_id
    end_id = args.end_id
    max_batch_size = args.max_batch_size
    max_seq_len = args.max_seq_len
    repetition_penalty = args.repetition_penalty
    presence_penalty = args.presence_penalty
    min_length = args.min_length
    weights_data_type = args.weights_data_type
    return_cum_log_probs = args.return_cum_log_probs
    return_output_length = return_cum_log_probs > 0
    shared_contexts_ratio = args.shared_contexts_ratio

    print('\n=================== Arguments ===================')
    for k, v in vars(args).items():
        print(f'{k.ljust(30, ".")}: {v}')
    print('=================================================\n')

    if args.use_jieba_tokenizer:
        from examples.pytorch.gpt.utils.tokenizer import JiebaBPETokenizer
        enc = JiebaBPETokenizer(args.vocab_file)
    else:
        enc = encoder.get_encoder(args.vocab_file, args.merges_file)
    torch.manual_seed(0)

    comm.initialize_model_parallel(args.tensor_para_size, args.pipeline_para_size)
    rank = comm.get_rank()
    device = comm.get_device()

    # Inputs
    contexts = []
    if args.sample_input_file:  # conditional case
        with open(args.sample_input_file, "r") as f:
            contexts = f.read().splitlines()
            batch_size = min(len(contexts), max_batch_size)
        contexts = contexts[:batch_size]
        start_ids = [torch.tensor(enc.encode(c), dtype=torch.int32, device=device) for c in contexts]
    else:  # unconditional case
        batch_size = max_batch_size
        contexts = ['<|endoftext|>'] * batch_size
        start_ids = [torch.IntTensor([end_id for _ in range(args.input_len)])] * batch_size

    start_lengths = [len(ids) for ids in start_ids]

    start_ids = pad_sequence(start_ids, batch_first=True, padding_value=end_id)
    start_lengths = torch.IntTensor(start_lengths)


    # Prepare model.
    if not args.use_gpt_decoder_ops:
        gpt = ParallelGPT(head_num, size_per_head, vocab_size, start_id, end_id,
                          layer_num, max_seq_len, tensor_para_size, pipeline_para_size,
                          lib_path=args.lib_path, inference_data_type=args.inference_data_type,
                          int8_mode=args.int8_mode, weights_data_type=weights_data_type,
                          shared_contexts_ratio=shared_contexts_ratio,
                          gpt_with_moe=gpt_with_moe,
                          expert_num=expert_num,
                          moe_k=moe_k,
                          moe_layer_index=moe_layer_index)
        if not gpt.load(ckpt_path=args.ckpt_path):
            print("[WARNING] Checkpoint file not found. Model loading is skipped.")
    else:
        assert moe_layer_index == []
        gpt = gpt_decoder.Gpt(
            num_heads=head_num,
            size_per_head=size_per_head,
            num_layers=layer_num,
            vocab_size=vocab_size,
            start_id=start_id,
            end_id=end_id,
            tensor_para_size=tensor_para_size,
            pipeline_para_size=pipeline_para_size,
            lib_path = args.lib_path,
            max_seq_len=max_seq_len,
            int8_mode=args.int8_mode,
            weights_data_type=args.weights_data_type)
        gpt.load(args.ckpt_path, args.inference_data_type)

    if args.enable_random_seed:
        random_seed_tensor = torch.randint(0, 10000, size=[batch_size], dtype=torch.int64)
    else:
        random_seed_tensor = torch.zeros([batch_size], dtype=torch.int64)

    bad_words_list=None
    if args.banned_words:
        batch_banned_words = args.banned_words.split("|")
        banned_words = [[banned_words_for_batch] for banned_words_for_batch in batch_banned_words]
        bad_words_list = torch.tensor(word_list.to_word_list_format(banned_words, enc)).to("cuda")

    repetition_penalty_vec = None if repetition_penalty == 1. else repetition_penalty * torch.ones(batch_size, dtype=torch.float32)
    presence_penalty_vec   = None if presence_penalty == 0. else presence_penalty * torch.ones(batch_size, dtype=torch.float32)

    infer_decode_args = dict(
        beam_width=beam_width,
        top_k=top_k * torch.ones(batch_size, dtype=torch.int32),
        top_p=top_p * torch.ones(batch_size, dtype=torch.float32),
        temperature=temperature * torch.ones(batch_size, dtype=torch.float32),
        repetition_penalty=repetition_penalty_vec,
        presence_penalty=presence_penalty_vec,
        beam_search_diversity_rate=beam_search_diversity_rate * torch.ones(batch_size, dtype=torch.float32),
        len_penalty=len_penalty * torch.ones(size=[batch_size], dtype=torch.float32),
        bad_words_list=bad_words_list,
        min_length=min_length * torch.ones(size=[batch_size], dtype=torch.int32),
        random_seed=random_seed_tensor
    )

    if not args.use_gpt_decoder_ops:
        def gpt_generate_fn():
            tokens_batch = gpt(start_ids,
                               start_lengths,
                               output_len,
                               return_output_length=return_output_length,
                               return_cum_log_probs=return_cum_log_probs,
                               **infer_decode_args)
            return tokens_batch
    else:
        def gpt_generate_fn():
            output_dict = gpt.generate(input_token_ids=start_ids,
                                       input_lengths=start_lengths,
                                       gen_length=output_len,
                                       eos_token_id=end_id,
                                       return_output_length=return_output_length,
                                       return_log_probs=return_cum_log_probs,
                                       **infer_decode_args)
            return output_dict

    # Generate tokens.
    gen_outputs = gpt_generate_fn()

    if rank == 0:
        if not args.use_gpt_decoder_ops:
            if return_cum_log_probs > 0:
                tokens_batch, _, cum_log_probs = gen_outputs
            else:
                tokens_batch, cum_log_probs = gen_outputs, None
        else:
            tokens_batch = gen_outputs['output_token_ids']
            cum_log_probs = gen_outputs['cum_log_probs'] if return_cum_log_probs > 0 else None
        if cum_log_probs is not None:
            print('[INFO] Log probs of sentences:', cum_log_probs)

        outputs = []
        tokens_batch = tokens_batch.cpu().numpy()
        for i, (context, tokens) in enumerate(zip(contexts, tokens_batch)):
            for beam_id in range(beam_width):
                token = tokens[beam_id][start_lengths[i]:]  # exclude context input from the output
                if args.skip_end_tokens:
                    token = token[token != end_id]
                output = enc.decode(token) if args.detokenize else ' '.join(str(t) for t in token.tolist())
                outputs.append(output)
                print(f'[INFO] batch {i}, beam {beam_id}:\n[Context]\n{context}\n\n[Output]\n{output}\n')

        if args.sample_output_file:
            with open(args.sample_output_file, "w+") as f:
                outputs = [o.replace("\n", "\\n") for o in outputs]
                f.writelines("\n".join(outputs))

    # Measure inference time.
    if args.time:
        iterations = 10
        for _ in range(iterations):
            gpt_generate_fn()
        time = timeit.default_timer()
        for _ in range(iterations):
            gpt_generate_fn()
        time_elapsed = timeit.default_timer() - time
        print(f'[INFO] GPT time costs: {time_elapsed * 1000 / iterations:.2f} ms')


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

file.content:
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "") # prevent the bugs for pytorch building
endif()

if(BUILD_PYT)
  if(DEFINED ENV{NVIDIA_PYTORCH_VERSION})
    if($ENV{NVIDIA_PYTORCH_VERSION} VERSION_LESS "20.03")
      message(FATAL_ERROR "NVIDIA PyTorch image is too old for TorchScript mode.")
    endif()
    if($ENV{NVIDIA_PYTORCH_VERSION} VERSION_EQUAL "20.03")
      add_definitions(-DLEGACY_THS=1)
    endif()
  endif()
endif()

if(USE_TRITONSERVER_DATATYPE)
  message("-- USE_TRITONSERVER_DATATYPE")
  add_definitions("-DUSE_TRITONSERVER_DATATYPE")
endif()

set(CXX_STD "14" CACHE STRING "C++ standard")

set(CUDA_PATH ${CUDA_TOOLKIT_ROOT_DIR})

set(TF_PATH "" CACHE STRING "TensorFlow path")
set(CUSPARSELT_PATH "" CACHE STRING "cuSPARSELt path")

if((BUILD_TF OR BUILD_TF2) AND NOT TF_PATH)
  message(FATAL_ERROR "TF_PATH must be set if BUILD_TF or BUILD_TF2 (=TensorFlow mode) is on.")
endif()

list(APPEND CMAKE_MODULE_PATH ${CUDA_PATH}/lib64)

# profiling
option(USE_NVTX "Whether or not to use nvtx" ON)
if(USE_NVTX)
  message(STATUS "NVTX is enabled.")
  add_definitions("-DUSE_NVTX")
endif()

# setting compiler flags
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS    "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS}")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS  "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -std=c++17")
set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS} -Xcompiler -Wall -ldl") # -Xptxas -v

set(SM_SETS 52 60 61 70 75 80 86 89 90)
set(USING_WMMA False)
set(FIND_SM False)

foreach(SM_NUM IN LISTS SM_SETS)
  string(FIND "${SM}" "${SM_NUM}" SM_POS)
  if(SM_POS GREATER -1)
    if(FIND_SM STREQUAL False)
      set(ENV{TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST} "")
    endif()
    set(FIND_SM True)
    set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS} -gencode=arch=compute_${SM_NUM},code=\\\"sm_${SM_NUM},compute_${SM_NUM}\\\"")

    if (SM_NUM STREQUAL 70 OR SM_NUM STREQUAL 75 OR SM_NUM STREQUAL 80 OR SM_NUM STREQUAL 86 OR SM_NUM STREQUAL 89 OR SM_NUM STREQUAL 90)
      set(USING_WMMA True)
    endif()

    if(BUILD_PYT)
      string(SUBSTRING ${SM_NUM} 0 1 SM_MAJOR)
      string(SUBSTRING ${SM_NUM} 1 1 SM_MINOR)
      set(ENV{TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST} "$ENV{TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST}\;${SM_MAJOR}.${SM_MINOR}")
    endif()

    list(APPEND CMAKE_CUDA_ARCHITECTURES ${SM_NUM})
    message("-- Assign GPU architecture (sm=${SM_NUM})")
  endif()
endforeach()

if(USING_WMMA STREQUAL True)
  set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS    "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS}    -DWMMA")
  set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS  "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS}  -DWMMA")
  set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS} -DWMMA")
  message("-- Use WMMA")
endif()

if(NOT (FIND_SM STREQUAL True))
  set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS}  \
                        -gencode=arch=compute_70,code=\\\"sm_70,compute_70\\\" \
                        -gencode=arch=compute_75,code=\\\"sm_75,compute_75\\\" \
                        -gencode=arch=compute_80,code=\\\"sm_80,compute_80\\\" \
                        -gencode=arch=compute_86,code=\\\"sm_86,compute_86\\\" \
                        ")
  #                      -rdc=true")
  set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS    "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS}    -DWMMA")
  set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS  "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS}  -DWMMA")
  set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS} -DWMMA")
  if(BUILD_PYT)
    set(ENV{TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST} "7.0;7.5;8.0;8.6")
  endif()
  set(CMAKE_CUDA_ARCHITECTURES 70 75 80 86)
  message("-- Assign GPU architecture (sm=70,75,80,86)")
endif()

if(BUILD_PYT)
  set(TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST $ENV{TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST})
endif()

set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG    "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG}    -Wall -O0")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG  "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG}  -Wall -O0")
# set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_DEBUG "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_DEBUG} -O0 -G -Xcompiler -Wall  --ptxas-options=-v --resource-usage")
set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_DEBUG "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_DEBUG} -O0 -G -Xcompiler -Wall -DCUDA_PTX_FP8_F2FP_ENABLED")

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD "${CXX_STD}")
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS} --expt-extended-lambda")
set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS} --expt-relaxed-constexpr")
set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS} --std=c++${CXX_STD} -DCUDA_PTX_FP8_F2FP_ENABLED")

set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE} -O3")
# set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_RELEASE "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_RELEASE} -Xcompiler -O3 --ptxas-options=--verbose")
set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_RELEASE "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_RELEASE} -Xcompiler -O3 -DCUDA_PTX_FP8_F2FP_ENABLED")
if(BUILD_FAST_MATH)
set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_RELEASE "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_RELEASE} --use_fast_math")
message("CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_RELEASE: ${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_RELEASE}")
endif()

set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/lib)
set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/lib)
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/bin)

set(COMMON_HEADER_DIRS
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}
  ${CUDA_PATH}/include
  ${CUTLASS_HEADER_DIR}
  ${CUTLASS_EXTENSIONS_DIR}
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/3rdparty/trt_fp8_fmha/src

# Copyright (c) 2021-2023, NVIDIA CORPORATION.  All rights reserved.

# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.

# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

import torch

from .gpt import GPT


class ParallelGPT(GPT):

    def cuda(self):
        self.weights._map(lambda w: w.cuda(self.device))
        if self.int8_mode != 0:
            self.weights._map_int8(lambda w: w.cuda(self.device))

        if self.build_model:
            del self.model
            self.build_model = False
        self.model = torch.classes.FasterTransformer.ParallelGptOp(
            self.head_num, self.size_per_head, self.inter_size,
            self.layer_num,
            self.expert_num,
            self.moe_k,
            self.moe_layer_index,
            self.vocab_size, self.start_id, self.end_id,
            self.tensor_para_size, self.pipeline_para_size, self.int8_mode,
            # GPT variant parameters
            self.layernorm_eps,
            self.layernorm_type,
            self.activation_type,
            self.has_positional_encoding,
            self.has_pre_decoder_layernorm,
            self.has_post_decoder_layernorm,
            self.has_adapters,
            self.adapter_inter_size,
            self.use_attention_linear_bias,
            self.weights.w,
            self.weights.int8_w,
            self.weights.scale,
            self.shared_contexts_ratio)
        self.build_model = True

set(PYTHON_PATH "python" CACHE STRING "Python path")
if(BUILD_PYT)
  execute_process(COMMAND ${PYTHON_PATH} "-c" "from __future__ import print_function; import torch; print(torch.__version__,end='');"
                  RESULT_VARIABLE _PYTHON_SUCCESS
                  OUTPUT_VARIABLE TORCH_VERSION)
  if (TORCH_VERSION VERSION_LESS "1.5.0")
      message(FATAL_ERROR "PyTorch >= 1.5.0 is needed for TorchScript mode.")
  endif()
  execute_process(COMMAND ${PYTHON_PATH} "-c" "from __future__ import print_function; import os; import torch;
print(os.path.dirname(torch.__file__),end='');"
                  RESULT_VARIABLE _PYTHON_SUCCESS
                  OUTPUT_VARIABLE TORCH_DIR)
  if (NOT _PYTHON_SUCCESS MATCHES 0)
      message(FATAL_ERROR "Torch config Error.")
  endif()
  list(APPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH ${TORCH_DIR})
  find_package(Torch REQUIRED)
  execute_process(COMMAND ${PYTHON_PATH} "-c" "from __future__ import print_function; from distutils import sysconfig;
print(sysconfig.get_python_inc());"
                  RESULT_VARIABLE _PYTHON_SUCCESS
                  OUTPUT_VARIABLE PY_INCLUDE_DIR)
  if (NOT _PYTHON_SUCCESS MATCHES 0)
      message(FATAL_ERROR "Python config Error.")
  endif()
  list(APPEND COMMON_HEADER_DIRS ${PY_INCLUDE_DIR})
  execute_process(COMMAND ${PYTHON_PATH} "-c" "from __future__ import print_function; import torch;
print(torch._C._GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI,end='');"
                  RESULT_VARIABLE _PYTHON_SUCCESS
                  OUTPUT_VARIABLE USE_CXX11_ABI)
  message("-- USE_CXX11_ABI=${USE_CXX11_ABI}")
  if (USE_CXX11_ABI)
    set(CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_RELEASE "${CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_RELEASE} -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=1")
    set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE} -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=1")

30	    def __init__(self, head_num, size_per_head, layer_num, vocab_size, max_seq_len, tensor_para_size, pipeline_para_size,
31	                 weights_data_type: typing.Union[str, np.dtype],
32	                 inference_data_type: str,
33	                 has_adapters: bool = False,

38	                 has_post_decoder_layernorm: bool = True,
39	                 int8_mode: int = 0,
40	                 inter_size: int = 0):
41	        assert(head_num % tensor_para_size == 0)
42	
43	        if int8_mode == 1:
44	            torch_infer_dtype = str_type_map[inference_data_type]
45	            assert torch_infer_dtype == torch.float16 or torch_infer_dtype == torch.bfloat16, "Weight only quant only supported for infer type fp16 or bf16."
46	            quant = torch.ops.fastertransformer.symmetric_quantize_last_axis_of_batched_matrix
47	            self.weight_transpose_calibrate_quantize = lambda x: quant(x, torch.int8)
48	        else:
49	            assert int8_mode == 0, "Invalid int8 mode for GPT. Must be 0 or 1"
50	
51	        self.head_num = head_num
52	        self.size_per_head = size_per_head
53	        self.layer_num = layer_num
54	        self.vocab_size = vocab_size
55	        self.max_seq_len = max_seq_len
56	        self.tensor_para_size = tensor_para_size
57	        self.pipeline_para_size = pipeline_para_size
58	        self.layers_per_device = layer_num // pipeline_para_size

62	        self.gpt_with_moe = gpt_with_moe
63	        self.has_positional_encoding = has_positional_encoding
64	        self.has_pre_decoder_layernorm = has_pre_decoder_layernorm
65	        self.has_post_decoder_layernorm = has_post_decoder_layernorm
66	
67	        local_head_num = head_num // tensor_para_size
68	        global_head_num = head_num
69	        local_hidden_units = local_head_num * size_per_head
70	        global_hidden_units = global_head_num * size_per_head
71	        local_inter_size = local_hidden_units * 4
72	        if inter_size != 0:
73	            assert inter_size % tensor_para_size == 0, f"inter_size({inter_size}) \% tensor_para_size({tensor_para_size}) must be 0"
74	            local_inter_size = inter_size // tensor_para_size
75	        local_adapter_inter_size = self.adapter_inter_size // tensor_para_size

77	        self.local_head_num = local_head_num
78	        self.global_head_num = global_head_num
79	        self.local_hidden_units = local_hidden_units
80	        self.global_hidden_units = global_hidden_units
81	        self.local_inter_size = local_inter_size
82	
83	        self.int8_mode = int8_mode
84	        self.share_embed = False
85	
86	        if isinstance(weights_data_type, str):
87	            try:
88	                weights_data_type = {
89	                    "fp16": np.float16,
90	                    "fp32": np.float32,
91	                    "float16": np.float16,
92	                    "float32": np.float32,
93	                }[weights_data_type]
94	            except KeyError:
95	                raise ValueError(f"Don't know how to interpret weights_data_type: {weights_data_type}")
96	
97	        assert weights_data_type in [np.float32, np.float16]
98	        self.weights_data_type = weights_data_type
99	        self.inference_data_type = inference_data_type
100	
101	        self.w = []
102	        self.int8_w = []
103	        self.scale = []
104	        # Transformer blocks
105	        self.w.extend([torch.zeros(global_hidden_units, dtype=str_type_map[
106	            self.inference_data_type])] * layer_num)   # self_layernorm_gamma
107	        self.w.extend([torch.zeros(global_hidden_units, dtype=str_type_map[
108	            self.inference_data_type])] * layer_num)   # self_layernorm_beta
109	        self.w.extend([torch.zeros(global_hidden_units, local_hidden_units * 3,

112	                      * layer_num)   # self_bias
113	        self.w.extend([torch.zeros(local_hidden_units, global_hidden_units, dtype=str_type_map[
114	            self.inference_data_type])] * layer_num)   # self_output_kernel
115	        self.w.extend([torch.zeros(global_hidden_units, dtype=str_type_map[
116	            self.inference_data_type])] * layer_num)   # self_output_bias

118	            self.inference_data_type])] * layer_num)   # ffn_layernorm_gamma
119	        self.w.extend([torch.zeros(global_hidden_units, dtype=str_type_map[
120	            self.inference_data_type])] * layer_num)   # ffn_layernorm_beta

137	            optional_adapter_offset += 2

140	                self.inference_data_type]))   # final layernorm gamma
141	            self.w.append(torch.zeros(global_hidden_units, dtype=str_type_map[
142	                self.inference_data_type]))   # final layernorm beta
143	            optional_adapter_offset += 2

145	            self.w.append(torch.zeros(max_seq_len, global_hidden_units, dtype=str_type_map[
146	                self.inference_data_type]))   # position_encoding_table
147	            optional_adapter_offset += 1

149	        self.pre_embed_idx = len(self.w)
150	        self.w.append(torch.zeros(vocab_size, global_hidden_units,
151	                      dtype=str_type_map[self.inference_data_type]))   # embedding_table
152	        self.post_embed_idx = len(self.w)
153	        self.w.append(torch.zeros(vocab_size, global_hidden_units, dtype=str_type_map[
154	            self.inference_data_type]))   # post embedding_kernel
155	        self.adapter_offset = 2 + optional_adapter_offset
156	
157	        self.w.extend([torch.empty(0, dtype=str_type_map[self.inference_data_type])] * layer_num)   # gating_weight
158	        self.adapter_offset += layer_num

161	        if self.has_adapters:
162	            self.w.extend([torch.zeros(global_hidden_units, local_adapter_inter_size,
163	                          dtype=str_type_map[self.inference_data_type])] * layer_num)   # adaptor1_kernel1
164	            self.w.extend([torch.zeros(local_adapter_inter_size, dtype=str_type_map[
165	                self.inference_data_type])] * layer_num)   # adaptor1_bias1
166	            self.w.extend([torch.zeros(local_adapter_inter_size, global_hidden_units,
167	                          dtype=str_type_map[self.inference_data_type])] * layer_num)   # adaptor1_kernel2
168	            self.w.extend([torch.zeros(global_hidden_units, dtype=str_type_map[
169	                self.inference_data_type])] * layer_num)   # adaptor1_bias2
170	            self.w.extend([torch.zeros(global_hidden_units, local_adapter_inter_size,
171	                          dtype=str_type_map[self.inference_data_type])] * layer_num)   # adaptor2_kernel1
172	            self.w.extend([torch.zeros(local_adapter_inter_size, dtype=str_type_map[
173	                self.inference_data_type])] * layer_num)   # adaptor2_bias1
174	            self.w.extend([torch.zeros(local_adapter_inter_size, global_hidden_units,
175	                          dtype=str_type_map[self.inference_data_type])] * layer_num)   # adaptor2_kernel2
176	            self.w.extend([torch.zeros(global_hidden_units, dtype=str_type_map[
177	                self.inference_data_type])] * layer_num)   # adaptor2_bias2
178	
179	        # Initialization
180	        self._map(lambda w: torch.nn.init.normal_(w, mean=0., std=1.))
181	
182	        if (self.int8_mode != 0):
183	            self.int8_w.extend([torch.zeros(global_hidden_units, local_hidden_units *
184	                               3, dtype=torch.int8)] * layer_num)   # self_int8_kernel
185	            self.scale.extend([torch.zeros(local_hidden_units * 3, dtype=torch.float)] * layer_num)   # self_scale
186	            self.int8_w.extend([torch.zeros(local_hidden_units, global_hidden_units, dtype=torch.int8)]

188	            self.scale.extend([torch.zeros(global_hidden_units, dtype=torch.float)] * layer_num)   # self_output_scale
189	            self.int8_w.extend([torch.zeros(global_hidden_units, local_inter_size,

202	                self.scale.extend([torch.zeros(global_hidden_units, dtype=torch.float)] * layer_num)   # adaptor1_scale2
203	                self.int8_w.extend([torch.zeros(global_hidden_units, local_adapter_inter_size,

205	                self.scale.extend([torch.zeros(local_adapter_inter_size, dtype=torch.float)]

211	    def __getitem__(self, idx):
212	        return self.w[idx]
213

218	        return len(self.w)

220	    def _map(self, func):
221	        assert(self.pre_embed_idx < self.post_embed_idx, "Pre decoder embedding index should be lower than post decoder embedding index.")
222	        for i in range(len(self.w)):
223	            if isinstance(self.w[i], list):

231	                    self.w[self.post_embed_idx] = self.w[self.pre_embed_idx]
232	                else:

306	                is_load(i)) for i in range(self.layer_num)])
307	        w.extend([load_to_torch(
308	                f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.mlp.dense_4h_to_h.bias.bin" \
309	                    if os.path.isfile(f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.mlp.dense_4h_to_h.bias.bin") \
310	                        else f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.mlp.moe.experts.dense_4h_to_h.bias.bin",
311	                is_load(i)) for i in range(self.layer_num)])
312	
313	        if self.has_pre_decoder_layernorm:
314	            w.append(load_to_torch(f"{ckpt_path}/model.pre_decoder_layernorm.weight.bin", True))
315	            w.append(load_to_torch(f"{ckpt_path}/model.pre_decoder_layernorm.bias.bin", True))
316	
317	        if self.has_post_decoder_layernorm:
318	            w.append(load_to_torch(f"{ckpt_path}/model.final_layernorm.weight.bin", True))
319	            w.append(load_to_torch(f"{ckpt_path}/model.final_layernorm.bias.bin", True))
320	
321	        if self.has_positional_encoding:
322	            wpe = load_to_torch(f"{ckpt_path}/model.wpe.bin", True).reshape(-1, self.global_hidden_units)
323	            assert self.max_seq_len <= wpe.size(0), (
324	                f"max_seq_len ({self.max_seq_len} must not exceed "
325	                f"the value of maximum sequence length during training ({wpe.size(0)})."
326	            )
327	            w.append(wpe)
328	        w.append(load_to_torch(f"{ckpt_path}/model.wte.bin", True))
329	        if os.path.isfile(f"{ckpt_path}/model.lm_head.weight.bin"):
330	            self.share_embed = False
331	            w.append(load_to_torch(f"{ckpt_path}/model.lm_head.weight.bin", True))
332	        else:
333	            self.share_embed = True
334	            w.append(torch.empty(0).to(str_type_map[self.inference_data_type]))
335	
336	        gate_list = []
337	        for i in range(self.layer_num):
338	            if (os.path.isfile(f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.mlp.moe.gate.wg.weight.bin")):
339	                gate_list.append(load_to_torch(f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.mlp.moe.gate.wg.weight.bin", True))
340	            else:
341	                gate_list.append(load_to_torch(f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.mlp.moe.gate.wg.weight.bin", False))
342	        w.extend(gate_list)
343	
344	        if self.has_adapters:
345	            w.extend([load_to_torch(
346	                    f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_attention_adapter.dense_h_to_4h.weight.{tp_rank}.bin" \
347	                        if os.path.isfile(f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_attention_adapter.dense_h_to_4h.weight.{tp_rank}.bin") \
348	                            else f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_attention_adapter.moe.experts.dense_h_to_4h.weight.{tp_rank}.bin",
349	                    is_load(i)) for i in range(self.layer_num)])
350	            w.extend([load_to_torch(
351	                    f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_attention_adapter.dense_h_to_4h.bias.{tp_rank}.bin" \
352	                        if os.path.isfile(f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_attention_adapter.dense_h_to_4h.bias.{tp_rank}.bin") \
353	                            else f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_attention_adapter.moe.experts.dense_h_to_4h.bias.{tp_rank}.bin",
354	                    is_load(i)) for i in range(self.layer_num)])
355	            w.extend([load_to_torch(
356	                    f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_attention_adapter.dense_4h_to_h.weight.{tp_rank}.bin" \
357	                        if os.path.isfile(f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_attention_adapter.dense_4h_to_h.weight.{tp_rank}.bin") \
358	                            else f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_attention_adapter.moe.experts.dense_4h_to_h.weight.{tp_rank}.bin",
359	                    is_load(i)) for i in range(self.layer_num)])
360	            w.extend([load_to_torch(
361	                    f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_attention_adapter.dense_4h_to_h.bias.bin" \
362	                        if os.path.isfile(f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_attention_adapter.dense_4h_to_h.bias.bin") \
363	                            else f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_attention_adapter.moe.experts.dense_4h_to_h.bias.bin",
364	                    is_load(i)) for i in range(self.layer_num)])
365	            w.extend([load_to_torch(
366	                    f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_ffn_adapter.dense_h_to_4h.weight.{tp_rank}.bin" \
367	                        if os.path.isfile(f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_ffn_adapter.dense_h_to_4h.weight.{tp_rank}.bin") \
368	                            else f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_ffn_adapter.moe.experts.dense_h_to_4h.weight.{tp_rank}.bin",
369	                    is_load(i)) for i in range(self.layer_num)])
370	            w.extend([load_to_torch(
371	                    f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_ffn_adapter.dense_h_to_4h.bias.{tp_rank}.bin" \
372	                        if os.path.isfile(f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_ffn_adapter.dense_h_to_4h.bias.{tp_rank}.bin") \
373	                            else f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_ffn_adapter.moe.experts.dense_h_to_4h.bias.{tp_rank}.bin",
374	                    is_load(i)) for i in range(self.layer_num)])
375	            w.extend([load_to_torch(
376	                    f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_ffn_adapter.dense_4h_to_h.weight.{tp_rank}.bin" \
377	                        if os.path.isfile(f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_ffn_adapter.dense_4h_to_h.weight.{tp_rank}.bin") \
378	                            else f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_ffn_adapter.moe.experts.dense_4h_to_h.weight.{tp_rank}.bin",
379	                    is_load(i)) for i in range(self.layer_num)])
380	            w.extend([load_to_torch(
381	                    f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_ffn_adapter.dense_4h_to_h.bias.bin" \
382	                        if os.path.isfile(f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_ffn_adapter.dense_4h_to_h.bias.bin") \
383	                            else f"{ckpt_path}/model.layers.{i}.after_ffn_adapter.moe.experts.dense_4h_to_h.bias.bin",
384	                    is_load(i)) for i in range(self.layer_num)])
385	
386	        assert len(self.w) == len(w)
387	
388	        # Reshape
389	        try:
390	            for i in range(len(w)):
391	                if w[i].nelement() == self.w[i].nelement():
392	                    self.w[i] = w[i].reshape(self.w[i].shape)
393	                else:
394	                    self.w[i] = w[i]
395	
396	        except RuntimeError:
397	            raise RuntimeError(
398	                f"head_num, size_per_head, vocab_size, and max_seq_len must be the same as the ones during training "
399	                f"(idx: {i} expected shape: {self.w[i].shape} got shape: {w[i].shape})."
400	            )
401	
402	        # transpose calibrate quantize the kernel
403	        layer_num = self.layer_num
404	        if self.int8_mode != 0:
405	            for i in range(layer_num):
406	                self.int8_w[i + 0 * layer_num], self.scale[i + 0 *
407	                                                           layer_num] = self.weight_transpose_calibrate_quantize(self.w[2 * layer_num + i])
408	                self.int8_w[i + 1 * layer_num], self.scale[i + 1 *
409	                                                           layer_num] = self.weight_transpose_calibrate_quantize(self.w[4 * layer_num + i])
410	                self.int8_w[i + 2 * layer_num], self.scale[i + 2 *
411	                                                           layer_num] = self.weight_transpose_calibrate_quantize(self.w[8 * layer_num + i])
412	                self.int8_w[i + 3 * layer_num], self.scale[i + 3 *
413	                                                           layer_num] = self.weight_transpose_calibrate_quantize(self.w[10 * layer_num + i])
414	
415	                # We clear the original weights since they are no longer needed
416	                if self.int8_mode == 1:
417	                    self.w[2 * layer_num + i] = torch.empty(0).to(str_type_map[self.inference_data_type])
418	                    self.w[4 * layer_num + i] = torch.empty(0).to(str_type_map[self.inference_data_type])
419	                    self.w[8 * layer_num + i] = torch.empty(0).to(str_type_map[self.inference_data_type])
420	                    self.w[10 * layer_num + i] = torch.empty(0).to(str_type_map[self.inference_data_type])
421	
422	                if self.has_adapters:
423	                    self.int8_w[i + 4 * layer_num], self.scale[i + 4 * layer_num] = self.weight_transpose_calibrate_quantize(
424	                        self.w[12 * layer_num + i + self.adapter_offset])
425	                    self.int8_w[i + 5 * layer_num], self.scale[i + 5 * layer_num] = self.weight_transpose_calibrate_quantize(
426	                        self.w[14 * layer_num + i + self.adapter_offset])
427	                    self.int8_w[i + 6 * layer_num], self.scale[i + 6 * layer_num] = self.weight_transpose_calibrate_quantize(
428	                        self.w[16 * layer_num + i + self.adapter_offset])
429	                    self.int8_w[i + 7 * layer_num], self.scale[i + 7 * layer_num] = self.weight_transpose_calibrate_quantize(
430	                        self.w[18 * layer_num + i + self.adapter_offset])
431	
432	                    # Similar to above:
433	                    if self.int8_mode == 1:
434	                        self.w[12 * layer_num + i + self.adapter_offset] = torch.empty(0).to(str_type_map[self.inference_data_type])
435	                        self.w[14 * layer_num + i + self.adapter_offset] = torch.empty(0).to(str_type_map[self.inference_data_type])
436	                        self.w[16 * layer_num + i + self.adapter_offset] = torch.empty(0).to(str_type_map[self.inference_data_type])
437	                        self.w[18 * layer_num + i + self.adapter_offset] = torch.empty(0).to(str_type_map[self.inference_data_type])
438	        return True

441	class GPT(nn.Module):
442	    def __init__(self,
443	                 head_num, size_per_head,
444	                 vocab_size, start_id, end_id, layer_num,
445	                 max_seq_len: int,
446	                 tensor_para_size: int,
447	                 pipeline_para_size: int,
448	                 lib_path: typing.Union[str, pathlib.Path],
449	                 inference_data_type: str,
450	                 inter_size: int = 0,
451	                 # gpt_variant_params
452	                 layernorm_eps: float = 1e-6,
453	                 layernorm_type: typing.Literal['pre_layernorm', 'post_layernorm'] = "pre_layernorm",
454	                 activation_type: str = "Gelu",
455	                 gpt_with_moe: bool = False,
456	                 expert_num: int = 0,
457	                 moe_k: int = 0,
458	                 moe_layer_index: typing.List = [],
459	                 has_positional_encoding: bool = True,
460	                 has_pre_decoder_layernorm: bool = False,
461	                 has_post_decoder_layernorm: bool = True,
462	                 has_adapters: bool = False,
463	                 adapter_inter_size: int = 0,
464	                 use_attention_linear_bias: bool = False,
465	                 int8_mode: int = 0,
466	                 weights_data_type: typing.Union[str, np.dtype] = np.float32,
467	                 shared_contexts_ratio: float = 1.0):
468	        super().__init__()
469	        self.head_num = head_num
470	        self.size_per_head = size_per_head
471	        self.vocab_size = vocab_size
472	        self.start_id = start_id
473	        self.end_id = end_id
474	        self.layer_num = layer_num
475	        self.inter_size = inter_size if inter_size != 0 else 4 * self.head_num * self.size_per_head
476	
477	        # gpt_variant_params
478	        self.layernorm_eps = layernorm_eps
479	        self.layernorm_type = layernorm_type
480	        self.activation_type = activation_type
481	        self.gpt_with_moe = gpt_with_moe
482	        self.expert_num = expert_num
483	        self.moe_k = moe_k
484	        self.moe_layer_index = moe_layer_index
485	        self.has_positional_encoding = has_positional_encoding
486	        self.has_pre_decoder_layernorm = has_pre_decoder_layernorm
487	        self.has_post_decoder_layernorm = has_post_decoder_layernorm
488	        self.has_adapters = has_adapters
489	        self.adapter_inter_size = adapter_inter_size
490	        self.use_attention_linear_bias = use_attention_linear_bias
491	
492	        # multi-gpu params
493	        self.tensor_para_size = tensor_para_size
494	        self.pipeline_para_size = pipeline_para_size
495	        self.use_sparse_gemm = False
496	        self.build_model = False
497	        self.int8_mode = int8_mode
498	        self.weights_data_type = weights_data_type
499	        self.shared_contexts_ratio = shared_contexts_ratio
500	
501	        assert torch.cuda.is_available(), "CUDA is required for this model."
502	
503	        assert head_num % tensor_para_size == 0, "head_num must be a multiple of tensor_para_size."
504	        assert layer_num % pipeline_para_size == 0, "layer_num must be a multiple of pipeline_para_size."
505	
506	        # Load the C++ model into Pytorch model.
507	        torch.classes.load_library(os.path.abspath(lib_path))
508	
509	        # Prepare weights
510	        self.weights = GPTWeights(head_num, size_per_head, layer_num, vocab_size,
511	                                  max_seq_len, tensor_para_size, pipeline_para_size,
512	                                  weights_data_type=weights_data_type,
513	                                  inference_data_type=inference_data_type,
514	                                  gpt_with_moe=self.gpt_with_moe,
515	                                  has_positional_encoding=self.has_positional_encoding,
516	                                  has_pre_decoder_layernorm=self.has_pre_decoder_layernorm,
517	                                  has_post_decoder_layernorm=self.has_post_decoder_layernorm,
518	                                  has_adapters=self.has_adapters,
519	                                  adapter_inter_size=self.adapter_inter_size,
520	                                  int8_mode=int8_mode,
521	                                  inter_size=inter_size)
522	
523	        # Prepare for tensor/pipeline parallel
524	        try:
525	            dist.init_process_group(backend='mpi')
526	        except:
527	            print("[INFO] WARNING: Have initialized the process group")
528	        self.rank = dist.get_rank()
529	        self.device_count = torch.cuda.device_count()
530	        self.device = self.rank % self.device_count
531	        torch.cuda.set_device(self.device)
532	
533	        world_size = dist.get_world_size()
534	        assert world_size == tensor_para_size * pipeline_para_size, "tensor_para_size * pipeline_para_size must be equal to world_size."
535	
536	        self.tensor_para_rank = self.rank % self.tensor_para_size
537	        self.pipeline_para_rank = self.rank // self.tensor_para_size
538	
539	    def load(self, ckpt_path):
540	        is_load = self.weights.load(ckpt_path, tp_rank=self.tensor_para_rank,
541	                                    pipeline_para_rank=self.pipeline_para_rank)
542	        self.cuda()
543	        torch.cuda.empty_cache()  # clean cache for model weight preprocessing
544	        return is_load
545	
546	    def sparse(self):
547	        if not self.use_sparse_gemm:
548	            self.use_sparse_gemm = True
549	
550	    def cuda(self):
551	        self.weights._map(lambda w: w.cuda(self.device))
552	        if self.int8_mode != 0:
553	            self.weights._map_int8(lambda w: w.cuda(self.device))
554	
555	        if self.build_model:
556	            del self.model
557	            self.build_model = False
558	
559	        self.model = torch.classes.FasterTransformer.GptOp(
560	            self.head_num, self.size_per_head, self.inter_size,
561	            self.layer_num,
562	            self.expert_num,
563	            self.moe_k,
564	            self.moe_layer_index,
565	            self.vocab_size, self.start_id, self.end_id,
566	            self.use_sparse_gemm,
567	            # gpt_variant_params
568	            self.layernorm_eps,
569	            self.layernorm_type,
570	            self.activation_type,
571	            self.has_positional_encoding,
572	            self.has_pre_decoder_layernorm,
573	            self.has_post_decoder_layernorm,
574	            self.has_adapters,
575	            self.adapter_inter_size,
576	            self.use_attention_linear_bias,
577	            self.weights.w)
578	        self.build_model = True
579	
580	    def forward(self,
581	                start_ids: torch.IntTensor,
582	                start_lengths: torch.IntTensor,
583	                output_len: int,
584	                beam_width: int = 1,
585	                top_k: typing.Optional[torch.IntTensor] = None,
586	                top_p: typing.Optional[torch.FloatTensor] = None,
587	                beam_search_diversity_rate: typing.Optional[torch.FloatTensor] = None,
588	                temperature: typing.Optional[torch.FloatTensor] = None,
589	                len_penalty: typing.Optional[torch.FloatTensor] = None,
590	                repetition_penalty: typing.Optional[torch.FloatTensor] = None,
591	                presence_penalty: typing.Optional[torch.FloatTensor] = None,
592	                min_length: typing.Optional[torch.IntTensor] = None,
593	                random_seed: typing.Optional[torch.LongTensor] = None,
594	                bad_words_list: typing.Optional[torch.IntTensor] = None,
595	                return_output_length: bool = False,
596	                return_cum_log_probs: int = 0):
597	        if not self.build_model:
598	            # for the cases we don't load model
599	            self.cuda()
600	            torch.cuda.empty_cache()  # clean cache for model weight preprocessing
601	        input_len = start_ids.size(1)
602	        assert input_len > 0, "input len must be larger than zero. For an unconditional case, use start_id as the first token."
603	
604	        # Inputs to device
605	        start_ids = start_ids.cuda(self.device)
606	        start_lengths = start_lengths.cuda(self.device)
607	        # outputs: output_ids, output_lengths, output_cum_log_probs (optional)
608	        outputs = self.model.forward(start_ids,
609	                                     start_lengths,
610	                                     output_len,
611	                                     beam_width,  # optional, can be None
612	                                     top_k,  # optional, can be None
613	                                     top_p,  # optional, can be None
614	                                     beam_search_diversity_rate,  # optional, can be None
615	                                     temperature,  # optional, can be None
616	                                     len_penalty,  # optional, can be None
617	                                     repetition_penalty,  # optional, can be None
618	                                     presence_penalty,  # optional, can be None
619	                                     min_length,  # optional, can be None
620	                                     random_seed,  # optional, can be None
621	                                     bad_words_list, # optional, can be None
622	                                     return_cum_log_probs)  # optional, can be None
623	        if return_cum_log_probs == 0:
624	            output_ids, output_lengths = outputs
625	        else:
626	            output_ids, output_lengths, output_cum_log_probs = outputs
627	        if return_output_length:
628	            if return_cum_log_probs > 0:
629	                return output_ids, output_lengths, output_cum_log_probs
630	            else:
631	                return output_ids, output_lengths
632	        else:
633	            return output_ids
634	
635	    def set_input_tensor(self, input_tensor):
636	        """Set input tensor to be used instead of forward()'s input.
637	
638	        When doing pipeline parallelism the input from the previous
639	        stage comes from communication, not from the input, so the
640	        model's forward_step_func won't have it. This function is thus
641	        used by internal code to bypass the input provided by the
642	        forward_step_func"""
643	        self.input_tensor = input_tensor
644

693	        do_not_include = ["sparse", "data_type"]
694	        args = {k: v for k, v in dataclasses.asdict(self).items() if k not in do_not_include}
695	        args["inference_data_type"] = dataclasses.asdict(self)["data_type"]

698	    @classmethod
699	    def from_args(cls, args, config_reader):
700	        model_name = args.model_name
701	        head_num = config_reader.getint(model_name, "head_num")
702	        size_per_head = config_reader.getint(model_name, "size_per_head")
703	        param = cls(
704	            head_num=head_num,
705	            size_per_head=size_per_head,
706	            layer_num=config_reader.getint(model_name, "num_layer"),
707	            # There is no limitation on the length when no positional encoding,
708	            # setting by a large enough integer.
709	            max_seq_len=config_reader.getint(model_name, "max_pos_seq_len", fallback=int(1e7)),
710	            tensor_para_size=config_reader.getint(model_name, "tensor_para_size"),
711	            vocab_size=config_reader.getint(model_name, "vocab_size"),
712	            start_id=config_reader.getint(model_name, "start_id"),
713	            end_id=config_reader.getint(model_name, "end_id"),
714	            weights_data_type=config_reader.get(model_name, "weight_data_type"),
715	            has_adapters=config_reader.getboolean(model_name, "has_adapters", fallback=False),
716	            adapter_inter_size=config_reader.getint(model_name, "adapter_inter_size", fallback=0),
717	            pipeline_para_size=(
718	                args.pipeline_para_size
719	                or config_reader.getint("ft_instance_hyperparameter", "pipeline_para_size", fallback=1)
720	            ),
721	            int8_mode=(
722	                args.int8_mode
723	                if args.int8_mode is not None
724	                else config_reader.getint("ft_instance_hyperparameter", "int8_mode", fallback=0)
725	            ),
726	            data_type=(
727	                args.data_type or
728	                config_reader.get("ft_instance_hyperparameter", "data_type",
729	                                  fallback=config_reader.get(model_name, "weight_data_type"))
730	            ),
731	            sparse=int(getattr(args, 'sparse', False)),
732	            inter_size=config_reader.getint(model_name, "inter_size", fallback=4*head_num*size_per_head)
733	        )
734	
735	        if config_reader.has_option(model_name, 'model_variant'):
736	            model_type = config_reader.get(model_name, 'model_variant')
737	            model_params = cls.PREDEFINED_MODELS[model_type]
738	            param.update(model_params)
739	
740	        return param
741	
742	    def update(self, update_params: dict):
743	        for k, v in update_params:
744	            setattr(self, k, v)
745	        return self
746	
747	    def asdict(self):
748	        return dataclasses.asdict(self)
749	
750	    @classmethod
751	    def update_argparser(cls, parser):
752	        parser.add_argument("--model-name", type=str, default="gpt", help="Model name from config.ini file")
753	        parser.add_argument("--pipeline-para-size", type=int, help="size of pipeline parallelism")
754	        parser.add_argument("--data-type", type=str, help="data type", choices=["fp32", "bf16", "fp16"])
755	        parser.add_argument(
756	            "--sparse", action='store_true',
757	            help="Enable sparse matrix multiplication. (Need SM 8.0 or 8.6 and SPARSITY_SUPPORT=ON)")
758	        parser.add_argument("--int8-mode", type=int, choices=[0, 1], help="Set int8 mode")
759	
760	
761	@dataclasses.dataclass
762	class GptRuntimeModelParameters:
763	    beam_width: int
764	    top_k: torch.Tensor
765	    top_p: torch.Tensor
766	    beam_search_diversity_rate: torch.Tensor
767	    temperature: torch.Tensor
768	    len_penalty: torch.Tensor
769	    repetition_penalty: torch.Tensor
770	
771	    def gpt_forward_kwargs(self):
772	        return dataclasses.asdict(self)
773	
774	    @classmethod
775	    def from_args(cls, args, config_reader, batch_size=None):
776	        bs = args.batch_size
777	        if batch_size is not None:
778	            bs = batch_size
779	        return cls(
780	            beam_width=args.beam_width or config_reader.getint("ft_instance_hyperparameter", "beam_width", fallback=1),
781	            top_k=(args.sampling_top_k or config_reader.getint("ft_instance_hyperparameter", "top_k", fallback=1)) *
782	            torch.ones(size=[bs], dtype=torch.int32),
783	            top_p=(args.sampling_top_p or config_reader.getfloat("ft_instance_hyperparameter", "top_p", fallback=0.0)) *
784	            torch.ones(size=[bs], dtype=torch.float32),
785	            beam_search_diversity_rate=(
786	                args.beam_search_diversity_rate
787	                or config_reader.getfloat("ft_instance_hyperparameter", "beam_search_diversity_rate", fallback=0.0)
788	            ) * torch.ones(size=[bs], dtype=torch.float32),
789	            temperature=(args.temperature or config_reader.getfloat("ft_instance_hyperparameter",
790	                         "temperature", fallback=1.0)) * torch.ones(size=[bs], dtype=torch.float32),
791	            len_penalty=(args.len_penalty or config_reader.getfloat("ft_instance_hyperparameter",
792	                         "len_penalty", fallback=0.0)) * torch.ones(size=[bs], dtype=torch.float32),
793	            repetition_penalty=(
794	                args.repetition_penalty or config_reader.getfloat("ft_instance_hyperparameter", "repetition_penalty", fallback=1.0)
795	            ) * torch.ones(size=[bs], dtype=torch.float32),
796	        )
797	
798	    def slice_args(self, idx):
799	        return GptRuntimeModelParameters(
800	            beam_width=self.beam_width,
801	            top_k=self.top_k[idx],
802	            top_p=self.top_p[idx],
803	            beam_search_diversity_rate=self.beam_search_diversity_rate[idx],
804	            temperature=self.temperature[idx],
805	            len_penalty=self.len_penalty[idx],
806	            repetition_penalty=self.repetition_penalty[idx],
807	        )
808	
809	    @classmethod
810	    def update_argparser(cls, parser):
811	        parser.add_argument("--beam-width", type=int, help="beam width")
812	        parser.add_argument("--sampling-top-k", type=int, help="Candidate (k) value of top k sampling in decoding")
813	        parser.add_argument("--sampling-top-p", type=float, help="Probability (p) value of top p sampling in decoding.")
814	        parser.add_argument("--temperature", type=float, help="temperature")
815	        parser.add_argument("--len-penalty", type=float, help="len_penalty")
816	        parser.add_argument("--repetition-penalty", type=float, help="repetition penalty")
817	        parser.add_argument("--beam-search-diversity-rate", type=float, help="beam_search_diversity_rate")
818	
819	
820	DEFAULT_START_TAG = "<|endoftext|>"
821	DEFAULT_END_TAG = "<|endoftext|>"
822	OPENAI_GPT2_START_ID = 50256
823	OPENAI_GPT2_END_ID = 50256
824	
825	
826	@dataclasses.dataclass
827	class GptModelConfig:
828	    model_name: str
829	    tensor_para_size: int
830	    head_num: int
831	    size_per_head: int
832	    inter_size: int
833	    num_layer: int
834	    max_pos_seq_len: int
835	    weight_data_type: str
836	    vocab_size: int
837	    start_id: int
838	    end_id: int
839	
840	    @classmethod
841	    def from_nemo_package(
842	        cls,
843	        *,
844	        args: argparse.Namespace,
845	        nemo_model_config: typing.Dict[str, typing.Any],
846	        bos_id: int,
847	        eos_id: int,
848	        vocab_size: int,
849	    ):
850	
851	        return cls(
852	            model_name="gpt",
853	            tensor_para_size=args.infer_gpu_num,
854	            head_num=nemo_model_config["num_attention_heads"],
855	            size_per_head=nemo_model_config["hidden_size"] // nemo_model_config["num_attention_heads"],
856	            inter_size=nemo_model_config["ffn_hidden_size"],
857	            num_layer=nemo_model_config["num_layers"],
858	            max_pos_seq_len=nemo_model_config["max_position_embeddings"],
859	            weight_data_type=args.weight_data_type,
860	            vocab_size=vocab_size,
861	            start_id=bos_id,
862	            end_id=eos_id,
863	        )
